revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-140

<big><big><big>Casquillo miniatura</big></big></big>


Casquillo de lámpara de pequeñas dimensiones, por ejemplo uno de rosca Edison en miniatura (tipo E14), pigmeo (tipo E10), etc. C.I.E


{{IALAFooter}}
